concerns: Step 16 creates docs/adr/004-threejs-renderer-bootstrap.md but an ADR already exists at Output/ADR/US-004.md (fast-tracked to main in de1b154). Reconcile — either reference the existing one or ensure the new one supersedes it without duplication.

Canvas has no explicit CSS width/height in index.html — it relies on attribute dimensions for layout. Verify the existing E2E bounding-box test (app-shell.spec.ts line 23) still passes after the shell resize handler is removed and renderer.setSize(w, h, false) takes over, since both write canvas.width/height attributes but the timing differs (shell sets them synchronously on load, renderer sets them after THREE.WebGLRenderer construction).
